name: Sonar (ASO)
description: Sonar — API-first ASO tool for App Store and Google Play with keyword research, difficulty scores, rank tracking, competitor analysis and MCP integrations for AI agents.

seo.title: Sonar (ASO) — App Growth Tooling (ASO)
seo.meta_description: Sonar (ASO): Sonar — API-first ASO tool for App Store and Google Play with keyword research, difficulty scores, rank tracking, competitor analysis and MCP integ

when_to_use: API-first keyword research for App Store and Google Play
Rank tracking and competitor analysis via ASO MCP integrations
Keyword difficulty scoring for app metadata optimization

pros: MCP integrations for AI agents out of the box
Keyword difficulty and rank tracking included
Covers both App Store and Google Play
cons: API-first means more dev work to use
Less polished UI than enterprise rivals
review.verdict: Developer-friendly ASO API with modern AI hooks; not the tool for marketers wanting dashboards only.
review.best_for: Dev teams integrating ASO data into custom tools or AI agents
review.not_for: Marketers who want a polished GUI and no API work
